conflictResolution.description: When multiple rules fire simultaneously, merge their recommendCategories lists (union) and take the highest minimumMethodCount across all matching rules. Do not drop categories from higher-priority rules in favour of lower-priority ones.

selectionPipeline: Classify assumption type and risk level
Evaluate all rules - multiple rules may fire simultaneously
Merge recommendCategories from all matching rules (union)
Take the highest minimumMethodCount across matching rules
Prefer qualitative signal before quantitative confirmation
Add real-world behaviour validation for high-stakes assumptions
Return phased sequence with explicit exit criteria

then.reasoning: High-risk assumptions need triangulation across categories to reduce false positives.
Early discovery should combine orientation, motivations, and observed real context.
Resonance should be tested with artefact reactions first, then behavior under real conditions.
Without an artefact, rely on context and motivation methods before solution testing.
When statistical confidence is required, include traffic-based or behavior-based methods.
